name: Band Chest Press
instructions: Anchor a resistance band behind you (e.g., around a sturdy pole or in a door anchor). Hold one end of the band in each hand at chest height, palms facing down. Stagger your stance or stand with feet shoulder‑width apart. Press the band forward until your arms are fully extended, feeling resistance throughout. Slowly return to the start position.
form_cues: Keep your shoulders down and back
Control the band — don't let it snap back
safety_notes: Check the band for wear and tear before use. Ensure the anchor point is secure. Avoid overstretching the band beyond its recommended range. If the band snaps, it can cause injury.
common_mistakes: Using a band that's too heavy
source: Resistance band training manuals, physical therapy resources
